promotions.title: Welcome is 15% Off
content: The coupon is link based and the customer should be able to click through the link in their email or sms to get it to apply

escalate: ESC expired codes/discount code issues, ask for cart ID and add it in esc notes
Don't send to CS for this client, ESC if needed
For retroactive discount requests add discount % in ESC note
ESC if a customer requests a different resolution, after their escalation was resolved
dos_and_donts: Fun Bucks AREN'T rewards points, those are given during exchanges
promo_and_exclusions: This brand does not use coupon codes or promotions. All of their discounts are exclusively link-based and are applied automatically to the shopping cart upon checkout when the appropriate conditions are met
Please do not advise customers to use promotional codes, do not provide them with any codes, and do not direct them to look on the website for additional codes
They do not have any promotional code text fields on site to facilitate use

conversation.message_text: Halloween Costumes: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Halloween Costumes.
Halloween Costumes: Welcome to Halloween Costumes! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.

Halloween Costumes: 
Thanks for subscribing! Shop this link to claim your 15% off. halloweencostumes.attn.tv/arYvda7n-dKB
Halloween Costumes: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates!

Halloween Costumes: 
Your 15% off is waiting for you. Check out our costumes & claim your discount! halloweencostumes.attn.tv/ah63S_fTuMkb

Halloween Costumes: 
Hey, this is Emily. 
Thanks for checking out our site:halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aj9P8SjwLy3f
Any questions I can answer for you?
I need to make sure the measurements are correct before I order the costume

Halloween Costumes: Thank you for letting me know. Our product measurements are taken in-house when we receive the product from the manufacturer to ensure accuracy. Please note that the measurements are of the costume itself, and not the person that will be inside of it. You can also check out our size guide here: https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aCAf9oOpWTKy
With the snow blizzard in nyc, does weather affect delivery?
Template used: "Order status/tracking update"; last updated: 2023-03-03 19:55:04.486

Halloween Costumes: That's a great question! It is possible that the shipment will be affected by the severe weather. Once you process your order, I highly suggest using our online tool for tracking your order to get updates about your delivery. 

You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://halloweencostumes.attn.tv/aU6haf8Uz93k

Barbell Apparel: Thank you, and I totally understand! Can you please also provide me with your email address?

Are you looking for anything in particular today?

Just browsing and wondering how mad my wife will get at me for actually buying daddy's home one and two in 4k, which at 8.78 and a 15 percent discount is a deal, question is, do I need this and the answer there is usually no

Movies Unlimited: Thank you for browsing! I'm sure she will understand. Especially if you enjoy the movies together. We appreciate the purchase and the support! If it helps, we offer free shipping on domestic orders over $50.
Is this a real person ? If so I'm impressed.  Uber support the other night for a late order was an hour of maddening insanity with an ai bot
Movies Unlimited: I'm actually a real person. We don't use bots in providing customer support. Feel free to message me if you have questions. I'm here to help.
Do you think Landman will ever get a 4k ? Guessing unlikely

I've throughly searched the 8.78 4k blu rays and made some picks, any similar discounts in the sales ? I've surfed through the various categories but those looked like the biggest discount on retail, beating sale prices anywhere else

Movies Unlimited: I don't have any info on whether the Landman series will be out in 4K but I certainly hope so. Regarding the discount, that's the best deal we have at this time. Is there anything else I can do for you while I still have you?
I'm good browsing Ty !!!
Really impressed and you've earned my business for whatever I can find here competitively priced which will be plenty
Over time

Movies Unlimited: You're welcome, Nicholas, and thank you for the kind words! Have a great day, and if you have any questions, feel free to text me. In the meantime, check out our Specials & Sales here: https://moviesunlimited.attn.tv/aihmu8g19X6J

I have Le Mans discounted to 8.78 and the scary movie trilogy as actual blu rays
Everything else is 4k
Hence why I guessed that's the issue
Movies Unlimited: Thank you for sending these over! Upon checking, the code 15OFF3 only applies to in-stock DVDs and Blu-rays. We appreciate your understanding on this!

promotions.title: VIP Black Friday
content:
Tiered Discount & Gift Promotion

• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Excludes: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers. Non-transferable. Not valid on previous purchases.

Gift with Purchase

• Use code VIP2025 for a free gift with orders $300+ (before taxes).

• Valid 11/24/25 – 11/30/25, 11:59 PM EST, or while supplies last.

• Limit one gift per order. Not eligible for return or exchange.

Exclusions & Rules

• Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions.

promotions.title: Black Friday
content:
• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Exclusions: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions.

• Non-transferable and not valid on previous purchases.

• Valid: 11/28/25 – 11/30/25.

promotions.title: Cyber Monday
content:
• Spend $200 → 25% off

• Spend $300 → 35% off

• Discount applied automatically at checkout.

• Exclusions: Gift cards. Cannot combine with other offers, codes, coupons, or promotions. Non-transferable and not valid on previous purchases.

• Gift with Purchase: Available on orders $300+ (before taxes). Select at checkout. Limit one gift per order. Valid 12/1/25 or while supplies last. Not eligible for return or exchange.

• Valid: 12/1/25 – 12/3/25.
